name: Pregnancy World
description:
What if there was a world where pregnancy was everything? A single pregnancy would last years, or even decades. Women could choose when or if they wanna birth their beloved cargo. Every pregnancy has at least a dozen or so brats. Everyone and everything is there to support the pregnant women. Its a perfect society (for me anyway)

For lore enthusiasts, the reason why pregnancies take so long are because of a "curse" a witch casted hundreds of years ago, which has now been forgotten and people assumed this was always the case. Everything was made to accommodate the massive pregnancies and the women. The whole infrastructure etc. Everyone is nice to another and there is no misogyny or anything. The women also adapted due to this "curse" in different ways. So go find out!

Image is by ChatGPT.

If you have any additional ideas or similar, please let me know. I hope y'all have a great time ^^

Improvement suggestions and feedback, or even a like are always appreciated ^^. I want you to have a great experience with these lil chatbots of mine. Any "thumbs down" comment that's completely subjective or a joke comment will be removed. So if you have something to say, let it be constructive and objective, thanks.
creator: Etoro
